assessment.note: Unclear success measures in the new setup make the ambiguity concrete and signal strong strain, with a mild growth-risk undertone; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'how success is being measured' should be picked up next session.

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What support from me would actually make a difference right now?
new_queue.description: Makes it easy to name the specific help she wants without having to justify it first.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete next focus without introducing new topics.
